description: UFR-022 lib-docs manifest. Source of truth for which libraries have a cached PATTERNS.md + LESSONS.md + raw snapshot. Tracked in git. Per-lib snapshots/PATTERNS.md/sources.json/VERSION = untracked, regenerated locally on demand by doc-fetcher + doc-curator agents.

warnings.note: getDefaultIntegrationsWithoutPerformance used by project but not on canonical v10 page
instrumentation-router not in v0.75.0 auto-instrumentations-node bundle README
31 packages collapsed; per-module deep dives deferred to upstream
canonical site at v16; project at v15.5.18 — Upgrading-to-v15 page is authoritative
framer-motion renamed to motion package; import from motion/react
only NavigationControl detailed; other controls listed by name
JSDoc class pages flattened to index
only 2.1.1 safe; 1.x and 2.0.x have unpatched DoS CVEs
v3.x deprecated; project pins v3.38.20; v5 docs differ
v2 surface at /legacy-gestures/; v3 paths return v3 content
upstream docs site has TODO stubs
repo moved awesomejerry/ -> Expensify/; no formal releases for 6.3.x
v11 renames: MapView->Map, ShapeSource->GeoJSONSource, per-type Layer -> unified
ESM-only since v10; v11.1.1 has GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq security fix
no bundled TS types; upstream CHANGELOG stale since 1.3.3
